tables.schema_preview:
CREATE TABLE ark_thread_seeds (
  seedId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  threadId TEXT NOT NULL,
  lawsUsedJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  evidenceIdsJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  heartJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  routeReason TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL
, topicClass TEXT, scriptureKey TEXT, selfPhase TEXT, intentPhase TEXT, driftRisk REAL, lawTraceJson TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', sourceKind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'synapse_to_thread_seed_v1');
CREATE INDEX idx_ark_thread_seeds_threadId ON ark_thread_seeds(threadId);
CREA

CREATE TABLE auth_password_reset_tokens (
      tokenId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      email TEXT NOT NULL,
      tokenHash TEXT NOT NULL,
      createdAt TEXT NOT NULL,
      expiresAt TEXT NOT NULL,
      usedAt TEXT,
      requestedIp TEXT,
      userAgent TEXT
    );
CREATE INDEX idx_auth_password_reset_tokens_email
      ON auth_password_reset_tokens(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_auth_password_reset_tokens_expiresAt
      ON auth_password_reset_tokens(expiresAt);

CREATE TABLE book_continuation_memory (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  thread_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  book_mode_requested INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  target_length_hint INTEGER,
  chapter_title TEXT,
  center_topic TEXT,
  last_book_intent TEXT,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_book_continuation_memory_thread_id
  ON book_continuation_memory(thread_id);

CREATE TABLE comparative_sacred_links (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  segment_id_a TEXT NOT NULL,
  segment_id_b TEXT NOT NULL,
  relation_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (
    relation_type IN (
      'common_core',
      'symbolic_overlap',
      'doctrinal_conflict',
      'historical_separation',
      'practice_parallel'
    )
  ),
  overlap_score REAL,
  conflict_score REAL,
  symbolic_only INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (symbolic_only IN (0, 1)),
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),

CREATE TABLE conversation_density_ledger_runtime_v1 (
      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
      thread_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      route_reason TEXT,
      metrics_json TEXT NOT NULL
    );

CREATE TABLE conversation_log (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  turn_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(role IN ('user','assistant')),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE(session_id, turn_index)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_conversation_log_session_turn
  ON conversation_log(session_id, turn_index);

CREATE TABLE crawl_pages (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  crawlRunId TEXT,
  crawl_run_id TEXT,
  url TEXT NOT NULL,
  title TEXT,
  body TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'fetched',
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_crawl_pages_crawlRunId ON crawl_pages(crawlRunId);
CREATE INDEX idx_crawl_pages_url ON

CREATE TABLE crawl_runs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT,
  seedUrl TEXT,
  seed_url TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_crawl_runs_projectId ON crawl_runs(projectId);

CREATE TABLE evolution_ledger_v1 (
  eventId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  sourceCard TEXT NOT NULL,
  changedLayer TEXT NOT NULL,
  beforeSummary TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  afterSummary TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  affectedRoute TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  affectedSourcePack TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  affectedDensity TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  affectedProse TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  regressionRisk TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
  acceptedBy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'runtime_v1',
  status TEXT NOT

CREATE TABLE export_artifacts (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT NOT NULL,
  format TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'markdown',
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  bytes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_export_artifacts_projectId ON export_artifacts(projectId);

CREATE TABLE export_jobs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  message TEXT,
  artifactId TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_export_jobs_projectId ON export_jobs(projectId);

CREATE TABLE invite_tokens (
  token TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  createdBy TEXT NOT NULL,
  note TEXT,
  usedBy TEXT,
  usedAt TEXT,
  expiresAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE iroha_actionpacks (
  packId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  kind TEXT NOT NULL,
  payloadJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNRESOLVED',
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
);

CREATE TABLE iroha_units (
  unitId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  doc TEXT NOT NULL,
  pdfPage INTEGER,
  anchor TEXT,
  kw TEXT,
  quote TEXT NOT NULL,
  quoteHash TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNRESOLVED',
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
);

CREATE TABLE kanagi_growth_ledger (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  input_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  route_reason TEXT,
  self_phase TEXT,
  intent_phase TEXT,
  heart_source_phase TEXT,
  heart_target_phase TEXT,
  heart_entropy REAL,
  topic_class TEXT,
  concept_mode TEXT,
  concept_alignment TEXT,
  scripture_key TEXT,
  scripture_mode TEXT,
  scripture_alignment TEXT,
  stability_score REAL,
  drift_risk REAL,
  should_persist INTEG

CREATE TABLE khs_apply_log (
  applyId    TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  threadId   TEXT NOT NULL,
  turnId     TEXT NOT NULL,
  mode       TEXT NOT NULL,                      -- NATURAL|HYBRID|GROUNDED
  deltaSJson TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  lawKey     TEXT NOT NULL,
  unitId     TEXT NOT NULL,
  applyOp    TEXT NOT NULL,
  decisionJson TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  createdAt  TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, routeReason TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT "");
CREATE INDEX idx_khs_apply_thread ON khs_apply

CREATE TABLE khs_laws (
  lawKey        TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  lawType       TEXT NOT NULL,                   -- DEF|LAW|RULE|PROC|EXAMPLE
  title         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  summary       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',         -- extracted only (no free generation)
  termKey       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  operator      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',         -- OP_DEFINE|OP_CLASSIFY|OP_CONSTRAIN|OP_REWRITE|OP_PLAN|OP_REFLECT
  truthAxis     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',         -- CANON|INTERPRET|PRAC

CREATE TABLE khs_seeds_det_v1 (
  seedKey TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  unitId TEXT NOT NULL,
  lawKey TEXT,
  quoteHash TEXT NOT NULL,
  quoteLen INTEGER NOT NULL,
  kanji2Top TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL
, usageScore INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE INDEX idx_khs_seeds_det_v1_lawKey ON khs_seeds_det_v1(lawKey);
CREATE INDEX idx_khs_seeds_det_v1_unitId ON khs_seeds_det_v1(unitId);

CREATE TABLE khs_terms (
  termKey   TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  display   TEXT NOT NULL,
  reading   TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  norm      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  aliasJson TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE khs_verifier_log (
  verifierId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,      -- deterministic id
  createdAt  TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  pdfUnitId  TEXT NOT NULL,
  otherUnitId TEXT NOT NULL,
  rawRatio   REAL NOT NULL,
  normRatio  REAL NOT NULL,
  threshold  REAL NOT NULL,
  verdict    TEXT NOT NULL,         -- PASS|FAIL
  reason     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  metaJson   TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'  -- holds full verdicts.json or subset
);
CREATE INDEX idx_khs_verifier_log_createdAt ON

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_chunks (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  file_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  tags TEXT, -- JSON array
  thinking_axis TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(thinking_axis IN ('observe', 'reflect', 'build', 'act')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  FOREIGN KEY (file_id) REFERENCES kokuzo_files(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
CREATE INDEX idx_kokuzo_chunks_file_id
  ON kokuzo_chunks(file_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_kokuzo_chunks_thinki

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_concept_edges (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  kernel TEXT NOT NULL,
  aEvidenceId TEXT NOT NULL,
  bEvidenceId TEXT NOT NULL,
  relation TEXT NOT NULL,          -- "CONTRADICTION" | "COMPLEMENT" | "EQUIV" 等
  zeroPointSeedId TEXT,            -- 後で統合Seedを生成したら入れる
  score REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.5,
  reason TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_concept_kernel ON kokuzo_concept_edges(kernel);
CREATE I

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_fractal_seeds (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  source_evidence_id TEXT NOT NULL,  -- "KZPAGE:..."
  source_doc TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_page INTEGER NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  concepts TEXT NOT NULL,            -- JSON array
  thinking_axis TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(thinking_axis IN ('observe','reflect','build','act')),
  kanagi_phase TEXT NOT NULL,        -- "L-IN" | "L-OUT" | "R-IN" | "R-OUT"
  created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_seed_source ON kokuzo

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_kanagi_process (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  seed_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_evidence_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  contradiction_note TEXT,      -- Phase II (R-IN)
  synthesis_insight TEXT,       -- Phase III (L-OUT)
  llm_model TEXT,
  llm_usage_json TEXT,
  created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  FOREIGN KEY(seed_id) REFERENCES kokuzo_fractal_seeds(id)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_kp_seed ON kokuzo_kanagi_process(seed_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_kp_eid  ON kokuzo_kanagi_process(source_evidence_i

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_l3_seeds (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  axis TEXT NOT NULL,            -- observe|reflect|build|act 等
  phase TEXT NOT NULL,           -- e.g. "L3"
  concepts TEXT NOT NULL,        -- JSON array string
  excerpt TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_evidence_id TEXT NOT NULL,  -- "KZPAGE:<doc>:P<n>"
  createdAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_l3_axis ON kokuzo_l3_seeds(axis);
CREATE INDEX idx_l3_source ON kokuzo_l3_seeds(source_evi

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_laws (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  threadId TEXT NOT NULL,
  doc TEXT NOT NULL,
  pdfPage INTEGER NOT NULL,
  quote TEXT NOT NULL,
  tags TEXT NOT NULL, -- JSON array of KotodamaTag
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, name TEXT, definition TEXT, evidenceIds TEXT);
CREATE INDEX idx_kokuzo_laws_threadId ON kokuzo_laws(threadId);
CREATE INDEX idx_kokuzo_laws_doc_page ON kokuzo_laws(doc, pdfPage);

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_ocr_pages (
  doc TEXT NOT NULL,
  pdfPage INTEGER NOT NULL,
  engine TEXT NOT NULL,                 -- tesseract / gpt4o / gemini / claude / custom
  text_raw TEXT,
  text_norm TEXT,
  qc_json TEXT,                         -- JSON: mojibakeRate/jpRate/missingRate/confidence/etc
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (doc, pdfPage, engine)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_kokuzo_ocr_pages_doc_page
  ON kokuzo_ocr_pages(doc, pdfPage);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'kokuzo_pages_fts_config'(k PRIMARY KEY, v) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'kokuzo_pages_fts_data'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, block BLOB);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'kokuzo_pages_fts_docsize'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sz BLOB);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS 'kokuzo_pages_fts_idx'(segid, term, pgno, PRIMARY KEY(segid, term)) WITHOUT ROWID;

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_restore_suggestions (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,                  -- UUID/ULID
  doc TEXT NOT NULL,
  pdfPage INTEGER NOT NULL,
  span TEXT,                            -- range/line/regex etc
  suggestion TEXT NOT NULL,
  basis_evidenceIds TEXT,               -- JSON array string
  method TEXT NOT NULL,                 -- regex / kotodama-law / fts-neighbor / llm-assist
  confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'proposed', -- proposed/accepted/rejected

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_seeds (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  source_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(source_type IN ('chat', 'file')),
  source_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  essence TEXT NOT NULL, -- compressed meaning
  ruleset TEXT, -- JSON object
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, seedId TEXT, threadId TEXT, kind TEXT, title TEXT, content TEXT DEFAULT '' NOT NULL, evidenceIds TEXT DEFAULT '[]' NOT NULL, createdAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')) NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX idx_kokuzo_

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_synapses (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,              -- SYN:<LawID>:<Doc>:<Page>:<Hash>
  fromLawId TEXT NOT NULL,          -- KHS Kernel Law ID
  toDoc TEXT NOT NULL,
  toPdfPage INTEGER NOT NULL,
  score REAL NOT NULL,              -- 0.0 - 1.0
  reason TEXT NOT NULL,             -- Human readable reason
  evidenceQuote TEXT,               -- Snippet from target page
  evidenceIds TEXT,                 -- JSON array string e.g. ["KZPAGE:...","KZPAGE:..."]
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'P

CREATE TABLE kokuzo_synapses_backup(
  id TEXT,
  fromLawId TEXT,
  toDoc TEXT,
  toPdfPage INT,
  score REAL,
  reason TEXT,
  evidenceQuote TEXT,
  evidenceIds TEXT,
  status TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT,
  updatedAt TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE kz_seed_events (
  instanceId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  seedId TEXT NOT NULL,
  ownerId TEXT NOT NULL,
  routeReason TEXT NOT NULL,
  phase TEXT NOT NULL,
  integrityAnchor TEXT,
  createdAt INTEGER NOT NULL
);
CREATE INDEX idx_kz_seed_events_owner_created
  ON kz_seed_events(ownerId, createdAt);

CREATE TABLE kz_seeds (
  seedId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  ownerId TEXT NOT NULL,
  routeReason TEXT NOT NULL,
  phase TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  integrityAnchor TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  createdAt INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE legacy_threads (
  thread_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  sourceDb TEXT NOT NULL,
  importedAt TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE member_status (
  email TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT,
  tier TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  paidAt TEXT,
  cancelledAt TEXT,
  syncedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  source TEXT DEFAULT 'spreadsheet'
);

CREATE TABLE memory_projection_logs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  thread_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  persona_id TEXT,
  projection_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  source_memory_ids_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  source_binding_ids_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE memory_units (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  memory_scope TEXT NOT NULL,
  scope_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  memory_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  title TEXT,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  structured_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  evidence_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  confidence REAL DEFAULT 0.7,
  freshness_score REAL DEFAULT 0.5,
  pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_memo

CREATE TABLE persona_deployments (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  persona_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  deployment_target TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE persona_knowledge_bindings (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  persona_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_label TEXT,
  binding_mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'retrieve',
  priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  metadata_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_persona_knowledge_bindings_person

CREATE TABLE persona_memory_policies (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  persona_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user_plus_project',
  policy_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE persona_preview_sessions (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  persona_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  preview_thread_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE persona_profiles (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  role_summary TEXT,
  system_mantra TEXT,
  mission TEXT,
  answer_contract TEXT,
  forbidden_behaviors_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  tone TEXT,
  verbosity TEXT,
  strictness REAL DEFAULT 0.8,
  creativity REAL DEFAULT 0.3,
  retrieval_mode TEXT DEFAULT 'grounded_first',
  evidence_threshold REAL DEFAULT 0.75

CREATE TABLE persona_versions (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  persona_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  version_no INTEGER NOT NULL,
  config_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  change_summary TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE philology_units (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  segment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  lang_tradition TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sa',
  lemma TEXT,
  root TEXT,
  morphology TEXT,
  gloss TEXT,
  semantic_domain TEXT,
  historical_notes TEXT,
  variant_notes TEXT,
  translation_alignment_json TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('n

CREATE TABLE reflection_queue_v1 (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  kind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'knowledge_node',
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  nas_uri_ref TEXT,
  source_registry_id TEXT,
  thread_id TEXT,
  memory_unit_id TEXT,
  payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  adjudication_note TEXT,
  notion_mirror_page_id TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_reflection_queue_v1_status_created ON r

CREATE TABLE runtime_projection_audit_v1 (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  thread_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  persona_id TEXT,
  memory_projection_log_id TEXT,
  reflection_queue_ids_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  constitution_refs_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  pack_compact_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_runtime_projection_audit_thread ON runtime_projection_audit_v1(thread_id, created_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE sacred_corpus_registry (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  tradition TEXT NOT NULL,
  corpus_family TEXT NOT NULL,
  title_original TEXT NOT NULL,
  title_japanese TEXT,
  language TEXT NOT NULL,
  script TEXT,
  edition TEXT,
  canon_tier INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  provenance_confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.5,
  translation_lineage TEXT,
  corpus_kind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'primary' CHECK (
    corpus_kind IN ('primary', 'translation', 'commentary', 'paraphrase', 'anthology')
  ),

CREATE TABLE sacred_segments (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  corpus_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_registry_id TEXT,
  book_or_scroll TEXT,
  chapter TEXT,
  verse_or_section TEXT,
  original_text TEXT,
  transliteration TEXT,
  normalized_text TEXT,
  translation_primary TEXT,
  translation_secondary TEXT,
  commentary_dependency TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_

CREATE TABLE scripture_learning_ledger (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  threadId TEXT NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  routeReason TEXT NOT NULL,
  scriptureKey TEXT,
  subconceptKey TEXT,
  conceptKey TEXT,
  thoughtGuideKey TEXT,
  personaConstitutionKey TEXT,
  hasEvidence INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  hasLawTrace INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  resolvedLevel TEXT NOT NULL,
  unresolvedNote TEXT
);
CREATE INDEX idx_scripture_learning_ledger_thread
  ON scripture_learnin

CREATE TABLE source_analysis_logs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT,
  sourceId TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ok',
  summary TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, analysisType TEXT, metaJson TEXT, fingerprint TEXT, analysis_phase TEXT, lineage_result TEXT, divergence_tags TEXT, transformation_stage T

CREATE TABLE source_registry (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  sourceType TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  uri TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  metaJson TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, fingerprint TEXT, originKind TEXT, lineage_family TEXT, trust_level TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'un
CREATE TABLE sqlite_sequence(name,seq);

CREATE TABLE sync_devices (
  userId TEXT NOT NULL,
  deviceId TEXT NOT NULL,
  lastSeenAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (userId, deviceId)
);

CREATE TABLE synced_chat_folders (
  userId TEXT NOT NULL,
  folderId TEXT NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  kind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  color TEXT,
  sortOrder INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  isDefault INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  isDeleted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (userId, folderId)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_synced_folders_user_updated ON synced_chat_folders(userId, updatedAt);

CREATE TABLE synced_chat_threads (
  userId TEXT NOT NULL,
  threadId TEXT NOT NULL,
  title TEXT,
  folderId TEXT,
  pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  isDeleted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (userId, threadId)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_synced_threads_user_updated ON synced_chat_threads(userId, updatedAt);

CREATE TABLE synced_sukuyou_rooms (
  userId TEXT NOT NULL,
  roomId TEXT NOT NULL,
  threadId TEXT,
  birthDate TEXT,
  honmeiShuku TEXT,
  disasterType TEXT,
  reversalAxis TEXT,
  shortOracle TEXT,
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL,
  version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  isDeleted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (userId, roomId)
);
CREATE INDEX idx_synced_sukuyou_user_updated ON synced_sukuyou_rooms(userId, updatedAt);

CREATE TABLE thread_center_memory (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  thread_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  center_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  center_key TEXT,
  center_reason TEXT,
  next_axes_json TEXT,
  source_route_reason TEXT,
  source_scripture_key TEXT,
  source_topic_class TEXT,
  source_self_phase TEXT,
  source_intent_phase TEXT,
  confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, essential_goal TEXT, success_criteria_json TEXT, constraints_json TEXT, clarification

CREATE TABLE training_rules (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(type IN ('vocabulary', 'policy', 'behavior', 'other')),
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  rule_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  tags TEXT, -- JSON string
  evidence_message_ids TEXT NOT NULL, -- JSON array
  confidence INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES training_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
CREATE INDEX idx_training_rules_session_id
  ON train

CREATE TABLE truth_axes_bindings (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  segment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  axis_key TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (
    axis_key IN (
      'creation',
      'law_dharma',
      'speech_logos_kotodama',
      'salvation_liberation',
      'purity_discernment',
      'kingship_order',
      'apocalypse_renewal'
    )
  ),
  confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.5,
  binding_reason TEXT,
  evidence_refs TEXT,

CREATE TABLE writing_draft_blocks (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT NOT NULL,
  chapterIndex INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  heading TEXT NOT NULL,
  goal TEXT,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  chars INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  continuitySummary TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_writing_draft

CREATE TABLE writing_outline_nodes (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT NOT NULL,
  parentId TEXT,
  parent_id TEXT,
  idx INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  heading TEXT NOT NULL,
  goal TEXT,
  depth INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_writing_outline_nodes_projectId ON wr

CREATE TABLE writing_progress_logs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT NOT NULL,
  prevState TEXT,

  nextState TEXT NOT NULL,

  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updatedAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_writing_progress_logs_projectId ON writing_progress_logs(project

CREATE TABLE writing_projects (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',

  bookSpec TEXT,
  continuitySummary TEXT,
  totalChars INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
, outline_json TEXT, draft_js

CREATE TABLE writing_review_logs (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,

  details TEXT,
  createdAt TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),

  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX idx_writing_review_logs_projectId ON writing_review_logs(projectId);

CREATE TABLE writing_sources (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId TEXT NOT NULL,
  sourceId TEXT,
  sourceType TEXT,

  doc TEXT,

);

CREATE TABLE writing_style_contracts (
